import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state):
    """Extract observation from environment state."""
    # Get grid dimensions
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    
    # Agent position (normalized to [0, 1])
    agent_pos = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_agent_y = agent_pos[0] / (H - 1)
    norm_agent_x = agent_pos[1] / (W - 1)
    
    # Agent direction (one-hot encoded)
    agent_dir_onehot = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4, dtype=jnp.float32)
    
    # Find goal position
    goal_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == 6)  # GOAL tile ID is 6
    
    # Get coordinates using meshgrid
    ys = jnp.arange(H, dtype=jnp.float32)
    xs = jnp.arange(W, dtype=jnp.float32)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    
    # Goal position (normalized)
    goal_count = jnp.sum(goal_mask)
    goal_y = jnp.sum(yy * goal_mask) / jnp.maximum(goal_count, 1.0)
    goal_x = jnp.sum(xx * goal_mask) / jnp.maximum(goal_count, 1.0)
    norm_goal_y = goal_y / (H - 1)
    norm_goal_x = goal_x / (W - 1)
    
    # Distance to goal (normalized by max possible distance)
    max_distance = jnp.sqrt((H - 1)**2 + (W - 1)**2)
    distance_to_goal = jnp.sqrt((agent_pos[0] - goal_y)**2 + (agent_pos[1] - goal_x)**2)
    norm_distance = distance_to_goal / max_distance
    
    # Relative position to goal (normalized)
    rel_y = (goal_y - agent_pos[0]) / (H - 1)
    rel_x = (goal_x - agent_pos[1]) / (W - 1)
    
    # Step count (normalized)
    norm_step = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 100.0
    
    # Concatenate all features
    observation = jnp.concatenate([
        jnp.array([norm_agent_y, norm_agent_x]),  # Agent position (2)
        agent_dir_onehot,                         # Agent direction (4)
        jnp.array([norm_goal_y, norm_goal_x]),    # Goal position (2)
        jnp.array([rel_y, rel_x]),               # Relative position (2)
        jnp.array([norm_distance]),              # Distance to goal (1)
        jnp.array([norm_step])                   # Step count (1)
    ])
    
    return observation.astype(jnp.float32)

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    """Compute reward for the transition."""
    # Get grid dimensions
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    
    # Find goal position in both states
    goal_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == 6)
    next_goal_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == 6)
    
    # Get coordinates
    ys = jnp.arange(H, dtype=jnp.float32)
    xs = jnp.arange(W, dtype=jnp.float32)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    
    # Goal position
    goal_count = jnp.sum(goal_mask)
    goal_y = jnp.sum(yy * goal_mask) / jnp.maximum(goal_count, 1.0)
    goal_x = jnp.sum(xx * goal_mask) / jnp.maximum(goal_count, 1.0)
    
    # Agent positions
    agent_pos = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    next_agent_pos = next_state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Distances to goal
    prev_distance = jnp.sqrt((agent_pos[0] - goal_y)**2 + (agent_pos[1] - goal_x)**2)
    curr_distance = jnp.sqrt((next_agent_pos[0] - goal_y)**2 + (next_agent_pos[1] - goal_x)**2)
    
    # Distance improvement reward (positive when getting closer)
    distance_reward = prev_distance - curr_distance
    
    # Check if agent is on goal tile
    agent_y, agent_x = next_agent_pos[0].astype(jnp.int32), next_agent_pos[1].astype(jnp.int32)
    on_goal = (next_state.grid[agent_y, agent_x, 0] == 6)
    goal_bonus = jax.lax.select(on_goal, 10.0, 0.0)
    
    # Small step penalty to encourage efficiency
    step_penalty = -0.01
    
    # Total reward
    total_reward = distance_reward + goal_bonus + step_penalty
    
    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
